treatment_information.specific_treatment: Latissimus free flap to the left superficial temporal artery and vein, left autologous fat grafting, acellular dermal matrix AlloDerm reinforcement, split-thickness skin graft
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Surgical preparation of calvarial defect and excision of margin of wound for pathology; split-thickness skin graft, 15 cm x 3 inches

treatment_timeline.event: Wide local advancement operation performed at outside hospital
Surgical procedures for defect reconstruction carried out

patient_outcome.complications: Necrosed skin graft and skin flaps
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Reports no fevers or chills, no drainage noted
